recentDiscussion: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/temp-check-protocol-fee-expansion-robinhood-chain/26168)

Foundation inspection request — Cantina bounty mediation policy enforcement (finding #784, 29-day stalled dispute) (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/foundation-inspection-request-cantina-bounty-mediation-policy-enforcement-finding-784-29-day-stalled-dispute/26160)
URC-4: Active Liquidity Framework Hook Interface (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/urc-4-active-liquidity-framework-hook-interface/26156)
URC-3: Hook TVL and Effective Liquidity Reporting (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/urc-3-hook-tvl-and-effective-liquidity-reporting/26155)

headline.en: V4 fee activation brewing but net inflation still bleeds 18M UNI/year—price stuck until burn exceeds emission.
headline.zh: V4协议费激活在即但净通胀仍年流失1800万UNI——价格突破需等销毁量超越增发量。

keyChanges.en: Protocol revenue jumped 7d to $760K (+37% vs prior week implied), but annualized burn of 1.78M UNI still dwarfed by 20M emission—net inflation runs +2.04%/year.
keyChanges.zh: 协议周收入升至76万美元(较前周隐含增长37%)，但年化销毁178万UNI仍远低于2000万增发——净通胀率+2.04%/年。

keyChanges.en: Two active Temp Checks to activate V4 protocol fees (Robinhood Chain + core V4 hooks)—if passed, could double fee capture within 60 days.
keyChanges.zh: 两项V4协议费激活提案进入温度检查(Robinhood Chain及核心V4 hooks)——若通过可在60天内使费用捕获翻倍。

keyChanges.en: Long/short ratio spiked to 2.12 (from ~1.6 last week) with OI flat at $20.6M—retail FOMO without smart money confirmation, classic bull trap setup.
keyChanges.zh: 多空账户比飙至2.12(上周约1.6)但持仓量持平于2060万美元——散户FOMO而聪明钱未跟进，典型多头陷阱配置。

contrarianObservation.en: V4 fee proposals ARE the catalyst bulls are waiting for, but the DAO historically takes 4-6 weeks from Temp Check to execution—by then ETH could roll over and kill the breakout narrative before fees even go live.
contrarianObservation.zh: V4费用提案确实是多头等待的催化剂，但DAO从温度检查到执行历史上需4-6周——届时ETH可能已转跌并在费用上线前扼杀突破叙事。

watchNext.en: Snapshot voting results on V4 fee activation (7-10 days)—passage would mark first structural revenue expansion since Fee Switch.
watchNext.zh: V4费用激活快照投票结果(7-10天内)——通过将标志Fee Switch以来首次结构性收入扩张。

watchNext.en: UNI/ETH ratio hold above 0.00190—losing this means UNI underperforms even if ETH rallies, death signal for breakout thesis.
watchNext.zh: UNI/ETH比率守住0.00190上方——失守意味即便ETH反弹UNI仍跑输，突破论证的死亡信号。

watchNext.en: Weekly protocol revenue sustaining above $800K—need 3 consecutive weeks to flip net inflation math at current price.
watchNext.zh: 周协议收入维持80万美元以上——需连续3周才能在当前价位扭转净通胀数学。

fullReasoning.en: UNI sits at $3.79, 36% below the treasury's $5.96 burn cost basis—a statistical anomaly that historically resolves upward within 90 days. The 2.77% weekly gain and +2.41% daily move signal technical basing, but volume remains anemic at $3.08M (compare to $50M+ during 2024 rallies). The critical development is governance momentum: two Temp Checks to activate V4 protocol fees are live, which could double Uniswap's fee capture if hooks and new chain integrations land. Current protocol revenue of $760K/week annualizes to $39.65M, yielding only $6.74M for buybacks—enough to burn 1.78M UNI while emission dumps 20M. Net inflation of +2.04%/year explains why price can't escape $3.50-4.00 despite bullish headlines. The V4 expansion is the first genuine structural catalyst since Fee Switch, but execution lag (4-6 weeks minimum) means the window closes if ETH weakens. Long/short ratio of 2.12 screams retail positioning without institutional conviction—open interest flat at $20.6M confirms this. Funding at +0.01% is neutral, no carry trade pressure either way. The trade here is NOT directional—it's an event straddle on governance outcomes. If V4 fees pass AND weekly revenue crosses $1M sustained, the net inflation math flips positive and $5.96 becomes magnetic. If proposals stall or ETH dumps sub-$1850, UNI revisits $3.20 support where the DAO's blended cost basis acts as a floor. Unichain TVL at $27M is a rounding error; ignore it. The real tell is whether the DAO can convert narrative (V4 hype) into math (revenue > emission cost). Until then, neutral with a 60-day fuse.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI报价3.79美元，较国库5.96美元销毁成本基准低36%——这一统计异常历史上在90天内向上修正。2.77%周涨幅和2.41%日涨显示技术筑底，但3.08M美元成交量仍显贫血(对比2024年反弹时的50M+美元)。关键进展在治理动能：两项激活V4协议费的温度检查提案已上线，若hooks及新链集成落地可使Uniswap费用捕获翻倍。当前76万美元周协议收入年化至3965万美元，仅产生674万美元回购预算——足以销毁178万UNI而增发倾泻2000万。+2.04%/年净通胀率解释了为何价格无法逃离3.50-4.00美元区间尽管利好频出。V4扩张是Fee Switch以来首个真正结构性催化剂，但执行滞后(最少4-6周)意味若ETH转弱窗口即关闭。2.12多空比高呼散户定位而无机构信念——持仓量持平于2060万美元证实这点。+0.01%资金费率中性，无套利交易压力。这里的交易不是方向性的——而是针对治理结果的事件跨式策略。若V4费用通过且周收入持续突破100万美元，净通胀数学翻正而5.96美元成为磁吸价位。若提案停滞或ETH跌破1850美元，UNI将重访3.20美元支撑位即DAO综合成本基准充当地板。Unichain的2700万美元TVL(锁仓总价值)是舍入误差，可忽略。真正信号在于DAO能否将叙事(V4炒作)转化为数学(收入>增发成本)。在那之前，中性立场附带60天引信。
